title: Blukar Mini Torch Rechargeable, EDC Keychain Flashlight with 3 Lighting Modes, IPX6 Waterproof, Memory Function, Compact Portable Pocket Torches for Daily Carry, Emergency, Camping, Hiking, Outdoor
features: Super Bright EDC Torch & 3 Modes: Blukar Mini EDC flashlight is compact yet powerful, boasting a bright beam and wide illumination range, suitable for daily use. Simply press the on/off button to easily switch between high, medium, and low modes. Whether walking in dark areas or needing emergency lighting, it precisely illuminates the path ahead, making it your reliable portable lighting companion.

USB Rechargeable & Smart Indicator Light: Built-in 130 mAh battery, just charge via the included USB port. A 2-hour charge provides up to 5.5 hours of continuous lighting at low brightness. Power switch also serves as battery indicator light: red light indicates charging or low battery, while green light indicates full charge or active use, making the battery status clear at a glance.

Convenient Shutdown & Memory Function: There are two ways to turn off the torch for you to choose from: 1. Turn on any mode for 8s, then press the switch again to turn it off. 2. In any mode, long-press the switch （for 3 seconds） to shut it down. Simple and efficient. Small torch also has a memory function. When you turn it on again, it retains the lighting mode you were in.

IPX6 Waterproof & Durable: Thanks to its IPX6 waterproof rating, the torch is unaffected by humid environments and can be used stable even in rainy weather. Made from high-quality, high-strength aluminium, it is lightweight, corrosion-resistant, and durable, ensuring convenient daily use and reliable emergency response capabilities. It is the ideal flashlight solution for various scenarios.

Keyring & Portable: Pocket torch comes with a circular keyring, allowing it to be easily attached to your waist, backpack or keychain, for all-day portability. Whether camping, walking, hiking, mountain climbing, backpacking, or fishing, it is always within reach, making it an indispensable portable lighting tool.(Tips: The torch only includes a small keyring，but not the larger keychain shown in the video.)
